pkgmetadata.longdescription: env.pyMapping environment variables can be a bit of a pain.Now you can replace this boilerplate ZENDESK_URL os.environ[ZENDESK_URL] ZENDESK_USER os.environ[ZENDESK_USER] ZENDESK_PASS os.environ[ZENDESK_PASS] ZENDESK_VIEW os.environ[ZENDESK_VIEW]With a simple call import env zendesk env.prefix(zendesk_) zendesk {user ..., pass ..., url ..., view ...}Or have a bit more control env.map(userzendesk_user) {user ...}
